summary: Tested Vendor Ratings & Issues navigation features and bug fixes. Backend APIs (11/11 tests passed). Frontend UI testing limited due to React Native Web auth state persistence issues in Playwright automation. Code review confirms correct implementation of all requested features.

integration_issues.issue: React Native Web TouchableOpacity buttons don't respond to Playwright click() - known RN Web limitation
Zustand persist middleware doesn't automatically hydrate from localStorage when injected via Playwright

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Profile page (lines 319-344) correctly implements Ratings & Reviews and Customer Issues navigation with data-testid attributes
VERIFIED: _layout.tsx (lines 16-17) registers vendor-ratings and vendor-issues routes
VERIFIED: vendor-ratings.tsx (line 76) uses correct auth token key 'token' instead of 'session_token'
VERIFIED: vendor-issues.tsx (line 75) uses correct auth token key 'token' instead of 'session_token'
VERIFIED: wisher-orders.tsx '0' rendering bug fix - all conditional && patterns converted to ternary operators

success_rate.frontend: Code review verified, UI automation limited due to RN Web constraints

context_for_next_testing_agent: React Native Web app has known Playwright automation challenges: 1) TouchableOpacity buttons require special handling for clicks, 2) Zustand persist state requires app-level hydration which doesn't occur when localStorage is injected externally. Use API-based testing for backend verification. For frontend, consider testing on mobile simulator or manually.
